PowerShell($content = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\Ryan McGuinness\\primer\\Wren V3 Canvas _standalone_.html" -Raw -Encoding UTF8; $lines = $content -split "`n"; for \($i = 0; $i -lt $lines.Count; $i++\) { if \($lines[$i] -match '__bundler/template'\) { Write-Output "Found at line $i"; $nextLine = $lines[$i+1]; Write-Output $nextLine.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(5000, $nextLine.Length\)\); break } })
